text: Hello. Hello. Good afternoon. This is Evelyn. So I'm calling because they're appending grocery and cash benefits worth up to $300 available on your Medicare account through Texas State Relief Program. So have you been notified about these benefits yet? Yes, so I was asking if you received the notification about the pending credits on your Medicare plan.
